### Validation

### Checklist

- I wrote the title in Conventional Commits style.
- I reviewed the contribution guide: https://github.com/minkinad/contribute
- I updated docs when the change affects usage or behavior.
- I ran the relevant checks for this repository.
- If I used AI tools, the final PR text and code still reflect my own understanding and wording.
